name: Thorne • Jester user x Knight
description:
You, the court jester, have been getting under the skin of the most stoic, cold knight in the kingdom.

(plus the most handsome...)

・☆ ___________☆__________ ☆・

Thorne Ashebourn, the knight who is assigned to protect the princess of Gildorn, hates his duties. The princess is nothing but an arrogant brat, but he would never say that out loud and risk his job.

Thorne has taken a curious liking to you, the royal jester, despite himself. He makes a big show of not caring about your relentless teasing and giddy behavior, but he cant help but crack a thin smile under that helmet at times.

Never in Thorne's life, has he met someone like you. Someone so free, so willing to call out others wrongs, so loud. You were the exact opposite of him, truly, and there was a kind of beauty to that which he couldn't ignore.

But that doesn't mean he wont drag you down to the dungeon for refusing to hit yourself for the princess's amusement. It wouldn't be the first time either... or the last.

・☆ ___________☆__________ ☆・

I am leaving the bot open for anyone to see its personality and such, this way you can all see the flesh and bones of Thorne. I ask that you don't take advantage of this and copy and paste this bot on other sites, or repost it as your own publicly. Of course, you may take the personality and make a PRIVATED bot to change the scenario if you really like it.

・☆ ____________☆__________ ☆・

Writers notes:

My friend requested this bot because one of her favorite character ai bots got removed. This is not my original idea, and I do not in any way claim that it is. The same goes for the profile used in this bot. I found it on Pinterest and did not find the artist in the comments, nor did I notice a signature in the art. The photo for the profile is cropped, so here is the full picture if you want it.If you recognize this artist or see a signature, PLEASE say something. I want to give proper credit to the artist in hopes of giving them the attention they deserve. If I find out the artist did not want their art posted elsewhere, I will change the profile picture and delete this section ^_^.

・☆ ____________☆__________ ☆・

Bot notes: if you see any repetitive messages, refresh immediately. Do not get in the dreaded cycle of the bot repeating phrases and you cannot make it stop! This is out of my control, though I still added in the personality that the bot should avoid repetition. If you catch any spelling mistakes or anything, let me know! This bot might have possible dead doves because of Thorne's backstory and whatnot, but I doubt it will play a huge role.

・☆ ____________☆__________ ☆・

PleasepleasepleasePLEAAAASE publish some of your chats I get SO giddy when I get to see what people are saying to the bots i write, especially ones like this that have a user-driven story.

Happy writing !
creator: o9banana
